root_text.an3.10:1.1: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato tayo male appahāya yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.10:1.3: Dussīlo ca hoti, dussīlyamalañcassa appahīnaṁ hoti;
root_text.an3.10:1.4: issukī ca hoti, issāmalañcassa appahīnaṁ hoti;
root_text.an3.10:1.5: maccharī ca hoti, maccheramalañcassa appahīnaṁ hoti.
root_text.an3.10:1.6: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato ime tayo male appahāya yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.10:2.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato tayo male pahāya yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an3.10:2.3: Sīlavā ca hoti, dussīlyamalañcassa pahīnaṁ hoti;
root_text.an3.10:2.4: anissukī ca hoti, issāmalañcassa pahīnaṁ hoti;
root_text.an3.10:2.5: amaccharī ca hoti, maccheramalañcassa pahīnaṁ hoti.
root_text.an3.10:2.6: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato ime tayo male pahāya yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an3.10:1.1: “Anyone who has three qualities, and has not given up three stains, is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.10:1.3: They’re unethical, and haven’t given up the stain of immorality.
translation_text.an3.10:1.4: They’re jealous, and haven’t given up the stain of jealousy.
translation_text.an3.10:1.5: They’re stingy, and haven’t given up the stain of stinginess.
translation_text.an3.10:1.6: Anyone who possesses these three qualities, and has not given up these three stains, is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.10:2.1: Anyone who has three qualities, and has given up three stains, is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.10:2.3: They’re ethical, and have given up the stain of immorality.
translation_text.an3.10:2.4: They’re not jealous, and have given up the stain of jealousy.
translation_text.an3.10:2.5: They’re not stingy, and have given up the stain of stinginess.
translation_text.an3.10:2.6: Anyone who possesses these three qualities, and has given up these three stains, is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
